input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8857 [Automation] java run fails for org.neo4j.driver:neo4j-java-driver:5.28.8; label=fails-java-run; body_chars=8015

risks: Full end-to-end query coverage of the Neo4j Java Driver would require a running Neo4j server, but the current issue is a regression in existing offline tests; adding Docker/Testcontainers setup is not justified unless local verification shows generated tests must execute real Cypher queries.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No concrete extra setup is required for the reported java-run failure: the resolved driver artifact brings its runtime dependencies transitively, ships its own native-image properties for Netty, and the existing failing coverage is offline value-mapping/ObjectInstantiator behavior rather than a live Neo4j connection.
